[Home](./index.md) &gt; [pi-ws](./pi-ws.md) &gt; [PiWs](./pi-ws.piws.md)

## PiWs class

Library-first wrapper around `uWebSockets.js` that exposes a built-in Pi RPC route and lets callers add their own HTTP and WebSocket handlers.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class PiWs<Session = unknown>
```

## Remarks

`PiWs` always reserves the built-in Pi RPC route at `${wsPrefix}/pi`<!-- -->. Additional HTTP handlers can be attached with `handle()`<!-- -->, additional WebSocket endpoints can be attached with `route()`<!-- -->, and advanced direct `uWebSockets.js` customization can be attached with `use()`<!-- -->.
